text: Developing a mobile app requires careful planning. One crucial aspect is *responsive design*, which ensures your app looks good and works well on various screen sizes, from small phones to tablets. Another major decision is choosing between *native* development (building separate versions for iOS and Android) and *cross-platform* development (using one codebase for multiple systems). Native apps often offer better *performance* and access to device features, while cross-platform tools can save time and money. Finally, you need to publish your app on official *app stores* like Google Play or the Apple App Store, which have their own guidelines and review processes.
